versions.version_description: I just think it sounds better and more closely reflects how the song really is played.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]F/C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  (2x)

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]G/B[/ch]             [ch]F/C[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
Grew up in a small town And when the rain would fall down[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G/B[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch] 
I'd just stare out my window[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]G/B[/ch]     [ch]F/C[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
Dreaming of what could be And if I'd end up happy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
I would pray [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]G/B[/ch]         [ch]F/C[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]  
Trying hard to reach out But when I tried to speak out           [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G/B[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch] 
Felt like no one could hear me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch]          [ch]F/C[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
Wanted to belong here But something felt so wrong here[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D2[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]F/G[/ch]
So I'd pray, I could break away [/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]                                 
I'll spread my wings and I'll learn how to fly. [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
I'll do what it takes till I touch the sky. [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
Make a wish, take a chance, Make a change, and break away. [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]                       
Out of the darkness and into the sun. [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
But I won't forget all the ones that I love[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]               
I'll take a risk, take a chance, Make a change, and break away      [/tab]

[Intro]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]F/C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]G/B[/ch]            [ch]F/C[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]
Wanna feel the warm breeze Sleep under a palm tree       [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
Feel the rush of the ocean[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G/B[/ch]         [ch]F/C[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch] 
Get onboard a fast train Travel on a jet plane[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D2[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]F/G[/ch]
Far away And break away [/tab]

(REPEAT CHORUS)


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
Buildings with a hundred floors, Swinging 'round revolving doors [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                 [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
Maybe I don't know where they'll take me But[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]D2[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]           
I gotta keep movin on, movin on, Fly away, Break away [/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch]          
I'll spread my wings and I'll learn how to fly.  [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]
Though it's not easy to tell you goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
Take a risk, take a chance, Make a change, and break away.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch] 
Out of the darkness & into the sun But I won't forget the place I come from[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]                                    
I gotta take a risk, take a chance,  Make a change, and [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
break away[/tab]
